definition: IG credit spreads widening >75bp from trough is the highest-ranked leading indicator for correlation regime flips, with a 6/7 hit rate across 13 post-1960 transitions and an 18-month lead time. Current IG OAS near cycle tights (~90-110bp) signals no imminent transition.
evidence: Only Tier 2b (yield curve un-inversion) currently active
Credit reprices first in any resolution per pair_0 and pair_1 debates
open_questions: Has covenant-lite structure extended the signal lead time from 18 months to 24-36 months?
Does current cycle tightness reflect genuine calm or structural opacity?
